## beehiiv automations get

Show a single automation by ID

### Synopsis

Get automation

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/automations/{automationId}

```
beehiiv automations get <automationId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv automations get aut_123
beehiiv automations show aut_123 --query expand=stats
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for get
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
